tag_main_split_explanation: The v0.0.3-alpha annotated tag is pinned to manifest commit 9bde6338. Currently-published artefacts: PyPI/npm built from main@51c4e6a; GitHub Release assets uploaded from main@d2b90a5 (both pre-gitleaks-remediation). The hashes below reflect a fresh local rebuild of CURRENT main HEAD 9d3baeb (= post-P3.4 positive crypto wiring + post-gitleaks remediation merge). They are NOT byte-identical to the published v0.0.3-alpha registry artefacts or Release assets — those remain frozen at their pre-gitleaks sha256. See pre_gitleaks_published_sha256 below. Tag has not been moved.

pre_gitleaks_published_sha256.note: These are the sha256 of the v0.0.3-alpha artefacts already published to PyPI / npm / GitHub Release. They are frozen and remain valid for downstream consumers who downloaded the originals. Future releases will use the post-gitleaks bytes documented in artifacts[] below.
